hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in *printenv*|*'cat .env'*|*'cat *.env'*|*'head .env'*|*'tail .env'*|*'less .env'*|*'more .env'*|*'echo $'*|*'modal secret list'*|*'modal secret get'*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: command may expose secrets or API keys"}'; exit 0;; esac; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(env|export)$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: command may expose secrets or API keys"}'; exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bprintenv\b'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: command may expose secrets or API keys"}'; exit 0; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.env|*/.env.*|*/run-supabase-mcp.sh) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: .env files contain secrets"}'; exit 0;; esac; }
